chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 468 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. Applicant is present in person. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. Proposed accused are present in person. Date of Hearing & Order: 27-11-2023 O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- Applicant’s application for registration of FIR was dismissed by impugned order dated 09.09.2022 after the police reports were called, which showed that no offence as alleged against the proposed accused, who are present in person and have denied the allegations, was committed. No further evidence has been produced by the applicant to establish his allegations. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed. However, the applicant may file a Crl. Direct Complaint, if he is so advised. JUDGE Ahmad
